title: Fasting's Metabolic Switch: The Science Is Clear. The Risks, Less So.
description: Intermittent fasting promises a fundamental metabolic shift, activating cellular repair and stress resistance. But while the biological mechanisms are compelling, recent clinical trials and a controversial new study raise serious questions about its real-world efficacy, potential risks, and whether it's truly superior to simple calorie restriction.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Fasting's Metabolic Switch: The Science Is Clear. The Risks, Less So.
